song.title: O Praise Him
song.author: David Crowder
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 C B V3 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .G 2 bars .G G/F# C2 Turn your ear to heaven and hear the noise inside . G G/F# The sound of angels' awe, the sound of angels' songs . C2 Am7 And all this for a King, we could join and sing, .C2 "All to Christ the King” [P] .D/F# C2 D/F# C2 How constant, how divine, this song of ours will rise .D/F# C2 D/F# C2 O, how constant, how divine, this love of ours will rise, will rise [C] .G D/F# Em7 C2 Am7 O Praise Him, O praise Him, He is Holy, He is Holy [V2] .G G/F# C2 Turn your gaze to heaven and raise a joyous noise . G G/F# The sound of salvation come, the sound of rescued ones . C2 Am7 And all this for a king, angels join to sing, .C2 All for Christ our King! [B] .D C2 D C2 How infinite and sweet, this love so rescuing .D C2 D C2 O, how infinitely sweet, this great love that has redeemed . C2 as one we sing! [V3] .G D/F# Em7 C2 Am7 Allelulia, Allelulia, He is Holy, He is Holy
